default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on content strategy and prioritize refresh/net new content for Outreach's blog](https://fathom.video/share/x8Mh28DJ2ukZ19uzvYchY3FrH6Qeb9iP?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX to start with 1 net new and 1 refresh piece for review before scaling up](https://fathom.video/share/x8Mh28DJ2ukZ19uzvYchY3FrH6Qeb9iP?tab=summary&timestamp=157.0)
  - [Outreach to provide 2 priority blog posts (1 net new, 1 refresh) to start with](https://fathom.video/share/x8Mh28DJ2ukZ19uzvYchY3FrH6Qeb9iP?tab=summary&timestamp=1553.0)
  - [GrowthX created Airtable with merged data on content performance and refresh opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/x8Mh28DJ2ukZ19uzvYchY3FrH6Qeb9iP?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)
  - [Scrunch dashboard set up to track Outreach's LLM visibility vs competitors](https://fathom.video/share/x8Mh28DJ2ukZ19uzvYchY3FrH6Qeb9iP?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)

## Topics

### Content Audit and Prioritization

  - [GrowthX merged data from Google Sheets, SEMrush, and GSC into Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/x8Mh28DJ2ukZ19uzvYchY3FrH6Qeb9iP?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Prioritized content refresh opportunities based on pipeline contribution:](https://fathom.video/share/x8Mh28DJ2ukZ19uzvYchY3FrH6Qeb9iP?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
      - [High: \>$1M to $100K](https://fathom.video/share/x8Mh28DJ2ukZ19uzvYchY3FrH6Qeb9iP?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
      - [Medium: $100K to $50K](https://fathom.video/share/x8Mh28DJ2ukZ19uzvYchY3FrH6Qeb9iP?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
      - Low: \<$50K
  - [Also prioritized based on click decay (losing up to 50 clicks vs previous period)](https://fathom.video/share/x8Mh28DJ2ukZ19uzvYchY3FrH6Qeb9iP?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)
  - [HTS recommendations incorporated, including adding CTAs to high-traffic pages](https://fathom.video/share/x8Mh28DJ2ukZ19uzvYchY3FrH6Qeb9iP?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)

### Content Refresh Process

  - [GrowthX can handle 5-7 refreshes per week minimum](https://fathom.video/share/x8Mh28DJ2ukZ19uzvYchY3FrH6Qeb9iP?tab=summary&timestamp=1113.0)
  - [Process: GrowthX stages changes, Outreach (Maria) reviews before publishing](https://fathom.video/share/x8Mh28DJ2ukZ19uzvYchY3FrH6Qeb9iP?tab=summary&timestamp=1073.0)
  - [Starting with 1 refresh and 1 net new piece to align on tone/style before scaling](https://fathom.video/share/x8Mh28DJ2ukZ19uzvYchY3FrH6Qeb9iP?tab=summary&timestamp=1445.0)

### Outreach's Content Strategy Shift

  - [Moving from campaign-based to persona/use-case based content](https://fathom.video/share/x8Mh28DJ2ukZ19uzvYchY3FrH6Qeb9iP?tab=summary&timestamp=1621.0)
  - [Aiming for 1-2 top-of-funnel pieces supporting meatier middle/bottom-funnel assets](https://fathom.video/share/x8Mh28DJ2ukZ19uzvYchY3FrH6Qeb9iP?tab=summary&timestamp=1692.0)
  - [Open to GrowthX's strategic recommendations and broader B2B insights](https://fathom.video/share/x8Mh28DJ2ukZ19uzvYchY3FrH6Qeb9iP?tab=summary&timestamp=1799.0)

### LLM Visibility Tracking (Scrunch)

  - [Dashboard shows Outreach's competitive presence vs Gong and others](https://fathom.video/share/x8Mh28DJ2ukZ19uzvYchY3FrH6Qeb9iP?tab=summary&timestamp=2156.0)
  - [Tracks overall presence, sentiment, and citations in LLM responses](https://fathom.video/share/x8Mh28DJ2ukZ19uzvYchY3FrH6Qeb9iP?tab=summary&timestamp=2165.0)
  - [Can add \~300 custom prompts; Outreach to provide sales/product team insights](https://fathom.video/share/x8Mh28DJ2ukZ19uzvYchY3FrH6Qeb9iP?tab=summary&timestamp=2204.0)

### Collaboration Tools

  - [Exploring integration between Asana (Outreach) and Airtable (GrowthX)](https://fathom.video/share/x8Mh28DJ2ukZ19uzvYchY3FrH6Qeb9iP?tab=summary&timestamp=1276.0)
  - [GrowthX to have visibility into Outreach's Asana for content pipeline alignment](https://fathom.video/share/x8Mh28DJ2ukZ19uzvYchY3FrH6Qeb9iP?tab=summary&timestamp=1598.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Outreach to send GrowthX 2 priority blog posts (1 net new, 1 refresh) to start with](https://fathom.video/share/x8Mh28DJ2ukZ19uzvYchY3FrH6Qeb9iP?tab=summary&timestamp=1553.0)
  - [GrowthX to share Airtable access and list of missing high-performing URLs](https://fathom.video/share/x8Mh28DJ2ukZ19uzvYchY3FrH6Qeb9iP?tab=summary&timestamp=1509.0)
  - [Outreach to review and comment on GrowthX's strategy artifacts (in Slack)](https://fathom.video/share/x8Mh28DJ2ukZ19uzvYchY3FrH6Qeb9iP?tab=summary&timestamp=2493.0)
  - [GrowthX to investigate Scrunch's capability to show "AI-visible" page structure](https://fathom.video/share/x8Mh28DJ2ukZ19uzvYchY3FrH6Qeb9iP?tab=summary&timestamp=2355.0)
  - [Schedule Atlas walkthrough for next meeting](https://fathom.video/share/x8Mh28DJ2ukZ19uzvYchY3FrH6Qeb9iP?tab=summary&timestamp=2439.0)

Send list of refresh candidates to Hadassah/Maria
Investigate top converting pages missing from GSC/SEMrush; check w/ web dev
Send Airtable access + details on missing pages to Hadassah
Check w/ PMMs re: additional Scrunch prompts (esp. competitor comparisons)
Resend artifacts in Slack for Hadassah/Maria review
Review artifacts from Aida in Slack; leave comments
Review artifacts from Aida in Slack; leave comments
